/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libqe_kssolver_dense.a CMakeFiles/qe_kssolver_dense.dir/DENSE/rotate_HSpsi_gamma.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_kssolver_dense.dir/DENSE/rotate_HSpsi_k.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_kssolver_dense.dir/DENSE/rotate_wfc_gamma.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_kssolver_dense.dir/DENSE/rotate_wfc_k.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_kssolver_dense.dir/DENSE/rotate_xpsi_k.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_kssolver_dense.dir/DENSE/rotate_xpsi_gamma.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_kssolver_dense.dir/DENSE/gram_schmidt_k.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_kssolver_dense.dir/DENSE/gram_schmidt_gamma.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_kssolver_dense.dir/DENSE/rotate_driver.f90.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libqe_kssolver_dense.a
